# VEDICA - Inbal Hanasab Ayurveda Clinic in Tel Aviv

> Official site facts about VEDICA and Inbal Hanasab.

## Entity Summary

- Inbal Hanasab (ענבל הנסב) is the founder of VEDICA and a certified Ayurveda practitioner in Tel Aviv.
- Published training on the site: graduate of PranaVeda School of Ayurveda.
- Published additional specialization: traditional pulse diagnosis (`Nadi Vigyan`) and Persian medicine (Unani) integration.
- Clinic location: Arlozorov 82, Tel Aviv, Israel (Merhavim Clinic).
- Main published focus areas: fertility and IVF support, digestive health (including IBD/colitis), hormonal balance, stress, sleep, fatigue, and personalized Ayurvedic nutrition.
- Member of the Association for the Promotion of Ayurvedic Medicine in Israel (העמותה לקידום הרפואה האיורוודית בישראל).
- Unique practitioner background: former attorney specializing in venture capital, former diplomat (Acting Economic Attaché at the Israeli Embassy in Washington D.C.), and musician.
- Languages: Hebrew, English.

## Patient Reviews (Infomed)

- Infomed profile: https://www.infomed.co.il/experts/153972/
- Aggregate rating: 5 out of 5 stars, based on 14 verified patient reviews.
- Selected review excerpts (Hebrew, verified, from Infomed):
  - "מהרגע הראשון הרגשתי בידיים מקצועיות וקשובות. ניכר שהיא בעלת ידע רחב מאוד ולא רק מבצעת את הטכניקה, אלא באמת מבינה את הקשר שבין גוף לנפש." (01/05/2026)
  - "ענבל מטפלת בחסד, עם המון ידע ורגישות. הרגשתי שהיא מתאימה את הטיפול בדיוק לצרכים שלי. מומלצת בחום." (30/04/2026)
  - "הרגשתי שהיא ממש מלווה אותי בכל התהליך בצורה רגישה ועדינה. הרגשתי שאני יכולה לפנות אליה בכל זמן." (08/01/2026)
  - "הגעתי עם רקע של קוליטיס (מחלת מעי דלקתית). ענבל ידעה להתאים לי תזונה וחליטות תה שמאוד הקלו." (06/01/2026)

## Clinic Overview

- First consultation
  About 2 hours, including questions about digestion, sleep, energy, stress, habits, emotional state, and traditional pulse diagnosis.

- Treatment structure
  An initial diagnostic session, a personalized plan with nutrition, herbs and lifestyle guidance, and a recommended follow-up session for refinement and ongoing support.

- Between-session support
  Patients can contact Inbal between sessions for questions that arise during implementation.

- Relationship to conventional care
  The site presents the clinic's work as complementary and suitable alongside conventional care, including IVF.

- Persian medicine integration
  Inbal integrates principles of Persian medicine (Unani) alongside Ayurveda, offering a combined approach based on individual body constitution and temperament.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/): Main overview of VEDICA, services, FAQ, and entity summary.
- [About Inbal Hanasab](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/about.html): Background, published training, and treatment philosophy.
- [Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Clinic overview, first session details, and FAQ.
- [Treatment Process](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/process.html): Step-by-step explanation of diagnosis, treatment plan, and follow-up.
- [Contact](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/contact.html): Contact form, WhatsApp, and direct outreach.

## Services

- [Clinic](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/clinic.html): Personal consultations, pulse diagnosis, and individualized care plans.
- [Workshops](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/workshops.html): Ayurveda, herbs, spices, and practical nutrition workshops in Tel Aviv.
- [Tours](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/tours.html): Levinsky Market food tour available in Hebrew or English, herbal medicine tour, spice tour, and culinary-culture experience in Tel Aviv, combining Ayurveda, Indian nutrition, Persian medicine, Iranian culture, infusions, and practical home use.
- [Podcast](https://vedica-ayurveda.co.il/podcast.html): Health and Ayurveda podcast by Inbal Hanasab.
